29 23 0:25 / /proc rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime - proc proc rw
36 25 8:1 / / rw,relatime - ext4 /dev/root rw
37 36 8:2 / /data\040disk rw,relatime shared:7 - xfs /dev/sdb1 rw
